title: Room Database — Entities and DAOs
objective: Define all four Room entities (Account, Category, Project, Transaction) and their DAOs. All six transaction types must be represented in the type enum. DAOs must return Flow<T> for reactive queries.
execution_steps: Create AccountEntity: id(UUID), name, type(enum: BANK/CASH/CREDIT_CARD/INVESTMENT), owner_label, created_at
Create CategoryEntity: id, name, icon, color
Create ProjectEntity: id, name, start_date, end_date

Create TransactionEntity with ALL fields per DATA-001 schema: id, account_id, category_id, project_id(nullable), type(enum: INCOME/EXPENSE/TRANSFER/OPENING_BALANCE/RECONCILIATION_ADJUSTMENT/REVALUATION), amount, date, created_at, owner_label, receiver, note, receipt_group_id(nullable), transfer_linked_id(nullable), is_system_generated
Add indexes: account_id, date DESC, receipt_group_id, project_id
Create AccountDao: insert, update, delete, getAll(): Flow<List<Account>>, getById()
Create CategoryDao: insert, update, delete, getAll(): Flow<List<Category>>
Create ProjectDao: insert, update, delete, getAll(): Flow<List<Project>>
Create TransactionDao: insert, insertAll(@Transaction), getAll(): Flow, getByAccount(), getByProject(), getByCategory()
Create AppDatabase @Database wiring all entities and DAOs
Wire DatabaseModule Hilt provider for AppDatabase and all DAOs
Write DAO unit tests: insert/query/delete for each entity
definition_of_done: All 4 entities compile with Room annotation processing
TransactionEntity type enum contains all 6 types
All DAOs return Flow<T> for read queries
./gradlew testDebugUnitTest passes for all DAO tests
